notes: Lonza is a global leader in life sciences and specialty chemicals with a significant personal care division. Their fermentation capabilities and lipid-based delivery systems make them a key partner for brands seeking biotechnology-derived cosmetic ingredients. Lonza's Lipex® natural lipid range provides high-performance emolliency and barrier repair, while their fermentation platform produces a range of bioactive compounds with excellent safety and efficacy profiles.

Lonza is a global leader in life sciences and specialty chemicals with a significant personal care division that benefits from pharmaceutical-grade manufacturing expertise. Their fermentation capabilities and lipid-based delivery systems make them a key partner for brands seeking biotechnology-derived cosmetic ingredients with the highest quality assurance. Lonza's Lipex® natural lipid range provides high-performance emolliency and barrier repair, while their fermentation platform produces bioactive compounds with excellent safety and efficacy profiles backed by extensive life sciences expertise. GMP-certified production facilities give Lonza a unique credibility advantage in the premium and dermo-cosmetic ingredient market.
